# Afu Portfolio

A crawler- and AI-agent-friendly summary of this website.

## Identity
- Name: Afu
- GitHub: https://github.com/Afumoons
- Location: Surabaya, Indonesia
- Role: Senior Full Stack Engineer

## Professional focus
Afu builds polished frontend experiences and practical full-stack systems: ERP/internal applications, dashboards, audit workflows, realtime products, AI-assisted workflows, marketing pages, and REST API-backed applications.

## Core stack
Laravel, PHP, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Nuxt, Vue, Flutter, REST APIs, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Python automation, GSAP, Three.js.

## Representative work areas
- Olympic Furniture Group ERP/internal applications/marketing sites/MORE app
- UPQuality Audit Mutu with AI assistant workflow direction
- Government-style Laravel portals
- Aurora Chat realtime product architecture
- Autonomous Trading AI data + automation system

## Contact
The page currently uses an email placeholder. Replace it before production client outreach.
